name: pmf
description: PMF engineering audit harness: score a dev tool / OSS on Time-to-First-Value, trust (false-positive economics), and wedge scoping.

interface.shortDescription: Audit a dev tool / OSS for product-market fit
interface.longDescription: PMF Engineering is an agent-team harness that audits a developer tool or OSS project on the three engineering dimensions that drive adoption: Time-to-First-Value (the seconds to first real result), trust (false-positive economics and verdict design), and wedge scoping (a sharp single-purpose surface over a reusable deep engine). It produces a composite PMF readiness score and a prioritized list of concrete fixes.
defaultPrompt: Audit this OSS for PMF before launch
Why isn't my dev tool getting adopted?
Score this repo on TTFV, trust, and wedge
